content.text:
Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1: DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup**

Each `<DescriptionList>` must wrap its children in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. There are 4 instances:
- Line 57-59: `<DescriptionList className="forklift-page-secret-title"><DisplayTitle .../></DescriptionList>`
- Line 71-73: `<DescriptionList className="forklift-page-secret-title"><DisplayTitle .../></DescriptionList>`
- Line 85-91: `<DescriptionList><DisplayTitle .../></DescriptionList>`
- Line 106-112: `<DescriptionList><DisplayTitle .../></DescriptionList>`

I need to wrap each `<DescriptionList>`'s children in `<DescriptionListGroup>` and add the import.

**Fix 2: Replace `Text` with `Content`**

`Text` is deprecated and should be replaced with `Content`. Looking at the file, `Text` is used at:
- Line 60: `<Text>{fields.user.description}</Text>`
- Line 74: `<Text>{fields.password.description}</Text>`
- Line 89: `helpContent={<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.helperTextPopover}</Text>}`
- Line 92: `<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.description}</Text>`
- Line 110: `helpContent={<Text>{fields.cacert.helperTextPopover}</Text>}`
- Line 113: `<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.description}</Text>`

All `Text` → `Content`, and update the import from `Text` to `Content`.

Let me now write the fixed file:

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup (`sd-cf-descriptionlist-descriptionlist-req-group`)
**Applied.** All 4 `<DescriptionList>` instances (lines 57, 71, 85, 106) now wrap their children in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. Added `DescriptionListGroup` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`. (`DescriptionListTermHelpTextButton` was not needed since it's not used in this file.)

### Fix 2 — Replace `Text` with `Content` (`semver-text-component-import-deprecated`)
**Applied.** All 6 usages of `<Text>` were replaced with `<Content>`:
- Line 60: `<Text>{fields.user.description}</Text>` → `<Content>...</Content>`
- Line 74: `<Text>{fields.password.description}</Text>` → `<Content>...</Content>`
- Line 89: `helpContent={<Text>...</Text>}` → `helpContent={<Content>...</Content>}`
- Line 92: `<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.description}</Text>` → `<Content>...</Content>`
- Line 110: `helpContent={<Text>...</Text>}` → `helpContent={<Content>...</Content>}`
- Line 113: `<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.description}</Text>` → `<Content>...</Content>`

Import updated: `Text` removed, `Content` added in the `@patternfly/react-core` import.

### Fix 2 — Replace `Text` with `Content` (`semver-text-component-import-deprecated`)
**Applied.** All 6 usages of `<Text>` were replaced with `<Content>`:
